SocialHub.title: Merkez n ussanen inemtiyen
SocialHub.subtitle: Ssnefraq tdukliwin n ussanen inemtiyen d tira.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: Sdukel isebtar-ik d uṭṭunen imeqqranen akken ad teẓreḍ srid. Ẓer belli uṭṭun-ik Instagram imeqqran yeddukkel ar usebter n Facebook.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: Sdukel uṭṭun-ik n TikTok akken ad teggzeḍ dɣa teẓreḍ ifidyuten srid.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Addukli srid ar Instagram d TikTok tura deg unekcum d asyaweḍ n tɣimit (Beta Urkisen). Tarrayt ad tettunefk di tidet ar tmetti deg ussanen i d-iteddun.

LandingPage.hero_h1_seo: RiveHub — Amezruy n uxxam n usufɣ
LandingPage.hero_description: Yal aqerru yewwi-d akwamas. Mačči aṭas n ifecka. RiveHub yesdukkel tigawin-ik, yeddaɛu iɣrisen-ik, dɣa yestehdi aseldaɣ-ik deg umenger n yal ass n lxedma.
LandingPage.hero_bg_alt: Uxxam n usufɣ imeqqran n imensi igerzen s tarbaɛt deg lxedma
LandingPage.features_card1_title: Aɛiwen n uḍfar d tigawin n tselwit
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: AI tessentaq asuqil n tira n tuzzya dɣa tettheggi tɣawsiwin i tɣellisin, akken ad tettuḥqeq sɣur tarbaɛt-ik.
LandingPage.features_card2_desc: Tɣuri tumast n tira n yeseldaɣ-ik.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: Tafaɛurt tettaɛdel iman-is srid ar tutlayt tumast n terbaɛt n uxxam-ik.
LandingPage.philosophy_bg_alt: Tameddurt tagnawt n uneggar n uxxam n imensi igerzen
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: Ad teddmeḍ uxxam n imensi ass-a am aqerru n lbapur deg udfel – bla ifecka, tetttazneḍ kan.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: RiveHub d akwamas iteddelen tallit ar tselwit n udabu.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: RiveHub ur itteddele tilmilt-ik – itezzi-tt s idata dɣa itteggez-itt ar yal aɛeggal n useldaɣ deg 25 tutlayin. Ulac tignatin deg lbapur.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_title: Tigi n lfayda iɣummren deg waman imeqqranen
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: Yal tigi n idata iqesseḥen d tigi deg wadda n tɣalt. Asunar n RiveHub itezzi-tt d tiddi qbel ad teṭṭfeḍ aman.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: Akkenni tettaɛdleḍ, akkenni lbapur-ik ilammed aman. D tmusni-k – mačči nneɣ.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: Yal ass bla idata d afriq iɣummren.
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: Snezdiɣ aɣal n usnerni afellay bla idata itezden.
LandingPage.social_proof_banner: Ilaq-d i uxamen n imensi imeqqranen deg Quebec
LandingPage.protocol_desc: IQ n uxxam-ik itezzi s yal taddukli.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: Yiwen n uqeffaf, RiveHub itebda ad yelmed amek telluḍ.
LandingPage.protocol_phase2_desc: Tiznayanin-ik yezrin uɣalent d asfugel i yal tɣawsa.
LandingPage.protocol_phase3_desc: 30 n tesnin n tuɣalin yal ass, usud-ik ad yessawḍ 92% n ṣṣeḥ.
LandingPage.features_card1_ai_suggestion: Ẓer amselɣuẓ (compressor) u tsebded yifsan deg wudem kan.
LandingPage.features_card2_alert: Taceṭṭabt tettwafa: Asegmmeḍ n yifsan deg 8°C.
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.nano_banana_title: Tafekka n tallit tajdidt. (Yettuseɣẓen s Tamusni).
LandingPage.nano_banana_subtitle: Awal afus n rebɛa n ifecka-nneɣ imaynuten i tseddurt n uɛuhdi n uɣref.
LandingPage.nb_haccp_desc: Emeɣriɣ iberdan-ik n usiden s yiwet n tergaẓ. Tḍeggiḍt n tissirt n wučči, yettumḍi s wudem uninig u wer yeɣli.
LandingPage.nb_sonar_desc: Taɣlafit n uɛeqqay. Ṭṭef asside, ssiẓen tizwarin timɣerfatin u senqed talɣa-ik n uselmed n tserɣint deg yiwet n wallen.
LandingPage.nb_ocr_desc: Tessamdeḍ taratut? Ḍeggeḍ tugna. Claude AI deg ussan-a yeẓẓu aḥric n umdan, adɣaɣ u izenzaden. Sselmet isefka imsuɣan.
LandingPage.nb_voice_desc: Eḍfer ibeddiaten-ik n uselmed u tallalen. Whisper V3 Turbo AI (yeɣɣi, amaziɣ) yettaru u yettarrat i terbaɛt merra.
LandingPage.f1_desc: Ttu tilugatin tilelliyin. Tiṭṭ n yiqeddacen, tullya n ifecka, u tucḍiwin n imsuɣan ttwarun u ttwaṭṭfen s AI.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: Aru tullya n ufecku (am "Asegmmeḍ 2 ittqiqi, amassawel yeẓra").
LandingPage.f1_ex2: Awḍen iẓra-ik yezwiren i terbaɛt n umesɣan.
LandingPage.f1_ex3: Ṭṭef tucḍiwin n imsuɣan (imsebriden) akken ad teqqseḍ iberdan.
LandingPage.f2_title: Yal ass tellaḍ tseddaḥit - Tilisa yellan fell-ak
LandingPage.f2_desc: Tlugat-ik, tettwabeddel. Seg tissisin n usegmmeḍ ar zzit n taɣawsa, RiveHub yettḥader yal tira u yettwaqqan tilisa-nni uqbel ad uɣalen d tilisa tifessasin.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: Asegmmeḍ yessaweḍ 8°C: tallalt i tseddaḥit "Ssebded neɣ erreẓ učči yellan deg lkettar".
LandingPage.f2_ex2: Tanekra tettwabeddel i yiqewwaɛ n zzit n taɣawsa.
LandingPage.f2_ex3: Tira HACCP deg tilawt n useqsi.
LandingPage.f3_desc: Ulac tuggdi n tutlayt deg uɣerbu. Yal amahil yesɛa amkan ɣer lbiruj akked tira deg tektabt s tutlayt-is.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: Amsag yura s Teṣbanyulit, aḥeffaf yesɣar s tebengalit.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: Tikarti n irisi ttwafhamen mrawen kan sɣur imahilen imaynuten.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: Tarrayin n laman ttwaksaben neɣ ma yella anda-tt seg tmurt i d-yekka umahil.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: Tettekki di lebni n usental RiveHub POS-nwen: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: Radar n rrbeḥ-nwen yeqqen ɣer RiveHub POS akken ad yeqqen aɣarasen n uznezɣer d uxellaṣ n lɛerc deg yiwet n teswiɛt.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Ssekcem aznezɣer-ik seg Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, neɣ Lightspeed s tuggta.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: Ẓer "Itriyen" mgal "Idɣaɣen" n tɣellawin s Matrix ifazen.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: Usental ur yemtawi? AI n RiveHub tettafeg tegmer agmar CSV.
LandingPage.f5_desc: Ḥbes tira n uɣlif s ufus. AI tettarra-d lmirat, tinqiṭin, akked ixellaṣen seg tifelwin-ik n tukci akken ad teqqen tifeɣatin-ik.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: Ssers-d tawlaft n takrart yesɣaɣen n usellɣay mi ara d-tewweḍ tukci.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: Ad tgerrez tanqit s tayeḍ akked tira n ixellaṣen ɣef tmergent.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: Tbeddel aɣaras n wučči n irisiwen-ik s tuggta d usentel.
LandingPage.f6_desc: Ssekcem imseɣliyen imaynuten s tira deg taɣellawin-ik tifelwiyin s yiwen kan n tewlaft.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: Ssers-d tira yesɣelben ɣef umenu n Tafaska n Tayri s yimuɣen iderwen.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: Suqel tira-yik s tuggta akken ad tessukcem imseɣliyen n ddunit meṛṛa.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: Ssers-d asmal yesɣelben ɣef tɣellawin-ik n tukci (UberEats, Deliveroo).
LandingPage.f7_desc: Sekcem iminigin-ik seg Libro, Resy, akked Zenchef. Webhooks akked asuter ugdil ɣef tinqiṭin deg yiwet n teswiɛt.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: Aṭṭef aɣtal s usentel ur yettili ara ufus.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: Sḍafar iɣessanen i d-wwḍen, ilɣuɣen, akked wid ur d-yuɣalen ara deg yiwet n tmuɣli.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: Qqen isefka n imseɣliyen akken ad tḥesbeḍ tafekka n umahil-ik.
LandingPage.f8_desc: Sonar Analysis tettara iminigin-ik, iɣerɣaren n uznezɣer, akked tifeɣatin akken ad tesmers-d abrid n tgezza.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: Ḥseb iɣessiwen ɣef yal tɣellawt ibedden ɣef uɣtal.
LandingPage.f8_ex2: Aggregates raw ingredients needed to survive the upcoming expedition.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: Qader axellaṣ n lɛerc uqbel ad tesseɣẓneḍ imɣan.
LandingPage.f2_mock_action: Tawlaft: Serrḥ i wučči yugten laman
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Sefhem amaru amaynut n yiḍ-a! Aɣersiw-ilellay aqbayli... ✨ Tameɣra deg bio 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: Tgelmam d tneɣrit i ad tsebded talɣa n lxedma-k yal ass.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: Aseɣzran-ik n Yemɣan i ad tserseḍ tignatin yeččuren d lfayda.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: Tignatin n lfayda yesɛan lqaylas akken a d-tesɛuḍ tignatin s timmad-is.
LandingPage.f9_desc: Aḍfar agejdan i tilmas tilemmasin. Sdukkel tizmamin n yidim, teffeɣ tizmamin n lqerɛat, d tameɣra tabrawanit kanban.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: Seffes-d qerɛa n lqerɛat d ayen icudden ɣer Tɣalt n Ukufi.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: Aḍfar agejdan n tɣalt n POS d tɣalt yesɛan lebɣi.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: Sdukkel tizmamit-ik n lbiṛ seg tmuɣli ɣer tsebbibit.
LandingPage.f10_desc: Ɣer asɣar asemmaḍ n tiɣaltin-ik. Tazzla d waman ttwafhamen yal ayyur akken a d-tḍefreḍ tiselɣutin uqbel ad d-tewweḍ tɣalt.
LandingPage.f11_desc: Aɣewwaɣ seg yigenni n tɣaltin-ik tadrimitin d arisalen yesɛan tazmert akken ad yesnerni lfayda-k. RiveHub d-isenned yal dular d yal tasekda i d-yekkan sɣur wayen i d-yekkan.
LandingPage.f11_ex1: Anerni uɣris n lfayda s tiseddart.
LandingPage.f11_ex2: Addad n tɣaltin d wayen i d-yekkan.
LandingPage.f11_ex3: Afares deg tɣaltin akken ad d-tesɛuḍ tignatin.
LandingPage.f3_target_example: Limpia el suelo a fondo esta noche.

Pricing.title: Amdel sseɛrat, tikkelt tameqqrant.
Pricing.subtitle: Bedd s uqbel, snerni m'ara teḥwajḍ.
Pricing.badge_free: Bedd s uqbel — ulac taṛqa n kredit.
Pricing.tier_essential_desc: Iɣisi yeǧhed akked temgilt akken ad tesɣerbeḍ igiten-ik yal ass.
Pricing.tier_performance_desc: Aɣbalu n rrbeḥ-ik akken ad tgerzeḍ iberdan akked leɛḍilat yesɛan lfayda.
Pricing.tier_enterprise_desc: Asuqsi n waṭas n imukan akked tallalt taṭiknikt yettunefken.
Pricing.feature_i18n: Uṭṭelqen n Waṭas n Tutlayin (25 Tutlayin)
Pricing.feature_unlimited_financial: Iɣalen n Idrimen Akk — Ulac tilisa
Pricing.tier_intelligence_desc: Tagrawla taquranit n rrbeḥ akked tmuɣliwin akken ad tsuddem tferka s timmunent.
Pricing.waste_calculator_title: Acḥal i k-tt-ixelleṣ uɣezdis-ik i tura?
Pricing.waste_calculator_subtitle: Ssenqed tuzzya n lɣella mebla isefka yesɛan leɛtab.
Pricing.enterprise_custom_desc: Aɣerbaz yettjemmilen, waṭas n imukan, tuzzya yettwabedlen, akked aselmed.
Pricing.nano_banana_title: Suite n Tallit Tadyant. (Yettwaxdam s Tmusni).
Pricing.nano_banana_subtitle: Ssensent-d aḍris-nneɣ ɣef ṛebɛa n yixxamen ineggura akken ad tesɛuḍ tnezzut-ik s tmusni.
Pricing.nb_haccp_desc: Bnu talɣiwin-ik i usentel s tmusni. Taleɣwaḍt ɣef talɣiwin akken ad teẓreḍ ma tesɛiḍ laẓ, tḍebbeɛ-it s ddaw ufus.
Pricing.nb_sonar_desc: Tafelsit n Umuqqel. Sḍeɣ s aḍris, d-sekfel tiɣimiwin n tnezzut-ik.
Pricing.nb_ocr_desc: Tesɛiḍ aselmad? Ger-it fell-as. Claude AI, seg tama-nniḍen, yeṭṭef amḍiq, tizi akked ayen yellan deg-s. A nif fell-ak ttaḍḍu n wammud.
Pricing.nb_voice_desc: Ger talɣiwin-ik d yiwet. Whisper V3 Turbo AI (tazzla tameqqrant, tifellet), teḍḍef-itent akked tazrawt i tejmaɛt.
Pricing.features_title: Akk iɣalen i illan i illan i tmestriwt.
Pricing.f1_desc: Ɛeqqel ttaḍḍu n telɣiwin. Iselmaden n iḍaren, tamsaltin n uɣermed akked tamestriwt n ddaw ufus.
Pricing.f1_ex2: Eǧǧ leɛnaya n tmeẓra i iḍaren.
Pricing.f1_ex3: Ger tamsaltin n udabu (i usirem), akken ad tbeddelḍ aɣerbaz.
Pricing.f2_desc: Amagrad-ik, s tmusni. Seg tissi n uɣermed i zzit, RiveHub teḍḍef-itent akked usentel.
Pricing.f2_ex1: Aggugem yesɛa 8°C: taɣiwant "Ssekfel aɣbalu n uɣermed".
Pricing.f2_ex3: Amagrad n tmeslifi n HACCP, ɣer tneɣruft.
Pricing.f3_title: Tazrawt n Tmusni ɣer 25 n Tutlayin
Pricing.f3_desc: Aẓaṛ n tutlayt ulac. Amagrad d uselmad deg tutlayt-nsen.
Pricing.f3_ex1: Umuqqel yeɣra s tmaziɣt, aḍraṛ yeɣra s tegrigett.
Pricing.f3_ex2: Talɣa n talɣa, tɣeɣ ɣer uselmad.
Pricing.f4_desc: Tamazirt-ik teṛwa ɣer POS i usentel n tɣiwant akked tmusni deg wakud.
Pricing.f4_ex1: Ssekfel tmusni-ik seg Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, neɣ Lightspeed.
Pricing.f4_ex3: Tamasirt ulac? RiveHub AI, tɣeɣ ɣer CSV.
Pricing.f5_desc: Ɛeqqel ttaḍḍu n telɣiwin s ufus. AI teṭṭef telɣiwin, uɣermed akked tɣiwant akken ad tessentelḍ izerfan-ik.
Pricing.f5_ex1: Ger taɣiwant n uselmad, akken ad tessefḍeḍḍeḍ.
Pricing.f5_ex2: Talɣiwin d tmusni n taɣiwant i uɣermed.
Pricing.f6_desc: Ṛweɛ izerfan i uɣermed akked umuqqel.
Pricing.f6_ex1: Ger taɣiwant i usentel n Valentine's Day.
Pricing.f7_desc: Sync akk tameɣriwin-ik seg Libro, Resy, akked Zenchef. Webhooks akked tɣiwant.
Pricing.f7_ex3: Aɣbalu n izerfan akken ad tessefḍeḍḍeḍ tamuɣli.
Pricing.f8_desc: Sonar Analysis tɣeɣ ɣer tamuɣli akked usentel n usirem.
Pricing.f8_ex1: Ger iberdan i usirem, ɣer udabu.
Pricing.f9_desc: Asleddu ussid i imdanen. Ssuref tamekkaẓ n wayen d-teffeɣ seg yifukal, tkeccmeḍ idrimen n yeqcac ɣer tama, tesɛuḍ kanban n usuffeɣ ameqqran n usenzu n cerveza.
Pricing.f9_ex1: Sbeddeḍ deg ussan-nni kan idrimen n yeqcac i teffeɣ seg wazal n wayen tetteɣḍ.
Pricing.f9_ex2: Seddu akken iwata ayen iḍaɛen (amgerrad) gar wayen t-tezzenzeḍ POS akked wayen yellan deg umezduy-ik.
Pricing.f9_ex3: Ssuref lebṣayet-ik n cerveza seg uzɣal ar ukecceḍ s tamekkaẓ meqqren.

CGU.title: Iselɣanen n Ulqem — RiveHub
CGU.s1_p1: RiveHub d allal n usufur-am-aselɣan (SaaS) yellan i wakken ad **iɛiwen** wid yellan d imawlan n irdanen, imḍebbren, akked widen yellan d imɛawnen deg umahil-nsen n yal ass s ttaɛwint n tiknikin n AI d lemɛun i d-yettasen seg isefka. Asenfar-a yettili ɣef **rivehub.com**.
CGU.s1_p2: Allal-a yefka-d, gar n wiyaḍ, tiknikin-a:
CGU.s1_l1: **Agdil aṛumant** — Tɣimit n tira n ufus seg AI, asegget umatar, tuksa n uzɣar, d temqerḍit n ttawil asekkiw
CGU.s1_l2: **Aḍfar n temerwal** — Ajerrid, talɣaḥ n tasleḍt, d temqerḍit n ttawil asekkiw yesɛan HACCP
CGU.s1_l3: **Adebber n unɣal** — Asegget, asenfel, d usefsi n unɣal akked useggem n ukayud n QR d usebtar aẓẓawan uɣrib
CGU.s1_l4: **Tasleḍt n wazal n ugensa** — Asegget umatar n talɣaḥ n tallunt s umḍiq, aseddu d imseqqad, aḍfar n wazalen, d temqerḍit n lfayda
CGU.s1_l5: **Aseknew n unɣal** — Aseggi n BCG-matrix n umḍiq n unɣal (Itri, Aɣrab, Aḍu, Iɣar) akked temqerḍit taklit i d-yettasen seg AI
CGU.s1_l6: **Tajerridt d tifawt taṛumanit (OCR)** — AI d talɣaḥ n tmuɣli n useqsi i wakken ad yessegzi isefka seg yiwet tajerridt d tifawt taṛumanit
CGU.s1_l7: **Tajerridt n wawal** — Asegget umatar yettwasnexdem ɣef ttawil n yireẓẓan, isefka n tajerridt takalt, d tɣermiwin
CGU.s1_l8: **Adebber n yireẓẓan** — Amseddu yettwasnexdem ɣef waṭas n tallunt d tɣimi n yimnasen
CGU.s1_l9: **Tallunt tametti** — AI yesseggem isefka i Instagram, Facebook, d TikTok
CGU.s1_l10: **Aḍfar n tfawt d tuffɣa** — Aseggi aɣarim vs. tikelt, tukkist n iɣsan, d ttawil asekkiw
CGU.s1_l11: **Aḍfar n tsellatin d tmella** — Ajerrid n tmella n yal ass d usseɣzel n lbanca
CGU.s1_l12: **Tasɣent n tajerridt (Le Nid)** — Agdil n yidrimen, tɣimi n tallunt taṣafit, d tallunt n uṭṭun n yedrimen
CGU.s1_l13: **Aḍfar n wazalen n tsellatin** — Aḍfar n tujjya n ttawil d waman
CGU.s1_p3: RiveHub d **allal n usselhu-tamezdayt**. Ur yettbeddil ara leɛqel amakken, tamusni taɣerfant, neɣ ilqaman n useqdac deg yiman nniḍen.
CGU.s2_p1: Deg iselɣanen-a, awalen-a lanen tameɣnest dagi:
CGU.s2_d1_def: Tallunt n RiveHub tella ɣef rivehub.com, gar-as tiknikin-is, APIs, d tsitratin yellan akken.
CGU.s2_d2_def: Kra n wemdan neɣ tinawt tamatant i yesɛan tajerridt ɣef tallunt-a d yeqbel iselɣanen-a.
CGU.s2_d3_def: Aɣrab n ugensa-amensay i yettwarun s useqdac deg usenfar, d adeg ameɣrad
CGU.s2_d4_def: Amezruy ameslay (LLM) d telɣaḥ n tmuɣli i d-yettasen seg yimseqqaden n yiman nniḍen (akken ad yili Anthropic / Claude), yettwakemmel deg usenfar i tasleḍt, asegget n isefka, d tukkist n isefka.
CGU.s2_d5_def: Kra n tlɣaḥ gar n usenfar d tallunt taberranit (tusnakt n POS, tallunt n yireẓẓan, tallunt tametti) s ttaɛwint n APIs neɣ webhooks.
CGU.s2_d6_def: Aseggi amakken n tɣimt — allal i wakken ad yessegzi tira d isefka seg tifsiriyin n uɣmis.
CGU.s2_d7_def: Akken ma yella igerdan, ayen yedduklen, neɣ ayen yeddan sɣur User deg Usenfar, ad yili d tɣawsiwin, ulɣuten, tifyar, tifelwin, tugniwin, temɛayact, akked usettel.
CGU.s2_d8_def: D amedlu amenẓaw ara d-yesken anda yewweḍ usettel dɣa ma yella yella wayen yesḥeqqen deg yesfren n uɣerbaz deg tilisa n usenfar.
CGU.s3_title: 3. Ad yili wemyaggar, tsekeltit, akk d tneɣruft n trebbaɛ.
CGU.s3_s1_p1: Akken ad taɛeqleḍ deg Usenfar ilaq ad tessekleḍ ameslay s tansa email yellan s ṣṣeḥ. User yeqbel ad yefk isefren yellan s ṣṣeḥ dɣa ad ten-yerr d ussan.
CGU.s3_s2_p1: User وحدو مسؤول على الإبقاء على بيانات اعتماد تسجيل الدخول سرية. تعتبر أي مهمة يتم تنفيذها ضمن حساب User بمثابة User. في حالة الاشتباه في تنازل المستخدم، يجب على User إخطار RiveHub دون تأخير.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: Bab n umeslay yezmer ad yɛreḍ iɣerbazen n trebbaɛ akken ad d-kecmen ɣer tẓuri n uɣerbaz. Turdiwin yellan:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Bab** — Ad yesɛu amur ummid, ad yelḥeq ɣer tadbelt n usettel, ad yɛreḍ dɣa ad yekkes iɣbazen.
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Amedbel** — Ad yesɛu amur ɣer modułat n uɣerbaz akk d usettel n uɣerbaz.
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Agbur n trebbaɛ** — Ad yaɣ tameɣra dɣa ad yeggez amur ɣef modułat yellan.
CGU.s3_s3_p2: Bab n umeslay d ameslul ɣef ayen tteggen iɣbazen n trebbaɛ deg Usenfar.
CGU.s3_s4_p1: Assettel n 14 n wussan n warraj yettunefk mebla taɣawsa tamaziɣt. Sakkin taseɛɛat, ilaq usettel idiman akken ad ikemmel uqeddec s tarrayin timseddurin. Ayen yedduklen deg usettel yettwaḥrez.
CGU.s4_p1: RiveHub yezmer ad yales aẓẓiɣen ɣer tarrayin n berra akken ad isnerni aɣerbaz-is. User yeqbel belli amtawa-agi yella ɣef tarrayin ttnedbalent sɣur iɣbazen yellan weḥden.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: Usenfar yettaker amtawa akked yifran-agi n POS:
CGU.s4_s1_p2: Ayen yedduklen seg wayen yettuzenz s amtawa-agi yessexdam akken ad yili unaɣlan n waray iɣarfan, asnerni n tifyar, akk d usenqed n uheggi.
CGU.s4_s2_p2: Ayen yedduklen seg ungered yessexdam akken ad yili usenqed n timmad n ungered akk d tarrayt n uheggi.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: Usenfar yezmer aẓẓiɣen ɣer tarrayin-agi akken ad yessufeɣ ayen yellan:
CGU.s4_s3_p2: User yettaker RiveHub akken ad yessufeɣ ayen yellan ɣef wudem-is sakkin ma yella yeqbel s talɣa n yal tesseklit.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: RiveHub ur yesɛi ara tamessurit ɣef tmerrit, beddel n API, tarrayin yellan tuginin, neɣ tmerrit ttwajerden ɣer tarrayin nniḍen. User d ameslul ɣef uḥraz n usettel n amtawa yellan s ṣṣeḥ akk d asenqed n tuginin n wayen yettwakaren.
CGU.s5_s1_p1: Usenfar yettaker tmusni tusnant (LLM akk d ugbur n tecfi) sɣur imdebbaren (Anthropic / Claude). Tarrayin-agi ttwessexdement akken:
CGU.s5_s1_l1: Ad yili unaɣlan akk d ubeddel n tɣawsiwin n tmeẓra
CGU.s5_s1_l2: Ad yefk tarrayin akken ad yettwaḥrez deg ayen yettwaɛerḍen (tilɣiwin, aɣerbazen)
CGU.s5_s1_l3: Ad yebeddel ayen yellan ɣer tutlayin yettwakren (25 n tutlayin)
CGU.s5_s1_l4: Ad yekkes ayen yellan seg tugniwin n tira akk d tifelwin (OCR)
CGU.s5_s1_l5: Ad yessufeɣ ayen yellan dɣa ad yejbed-it akken ad yili deg taɣamsa timetti
CGU.s5_s1_l6: Ad yefk tarrayin n usnerni n tifyar
CGU.s5_s1_l7: Snulfu-d umuɣen n uheggi s unedlul ɣef yisallen yellan zik d wayen yettraǧun ad yili
CGU.s5_s1_l8: Sneqqed akk iɣilfen n umekla d lfayda nniḍen
CGU.s5_s1_l9: Gerrez tilɣatin n yedrimen deg ubeddel n uḥsab
CGU.s5_s2_title: 5.2. Talast n garanti ɣef wayen yeffɣen seg uselkim
CGU.s5_s2_p1: **Tirrayin, iseqsiyyen, d wayen yettwakksen s uselkim yettunefken kan i lmend n uɣerru d ussefru.** Aseqdac ad iqbel d akken:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: Tirrayin n uselkim **ur d unṣiḥ ara n uẓref** deg umahil n laman n umekla, tqanuniyin, uḥsab, ṣṣeḥḥa n ugdud, neɣ yal ma d aqra.
CGU.s5_s2_l2: Tirrayin n uselkim **ur sbeddelen ara** tamawt n bab uẓref (ameḥḍar n ṣṣeḥḥa, umaɣlay n uḥsab yesɛan agerdas, bab tamussni deg usewwi).
CGU.s5_s2_l3: Aselkim yezmer ad yefk **agmadan ur neṣṣeḥ, ur ikemmel, neɣ ur yettusesmir ara** ɣef ddemma n lɛada n tallelt n tutlayt.
CGU.s5_s2_l4: **Lmend n umḍiq n yimalas yellan** — ad yili d isemkilen, timalas n yedrimen, tazwara n tira, d tɣawsiwin yettqadaɛen — **yeqqim kan ger ifassen n bab yettseqdacen**.
CGU.s5_s2_l5: RiveHub **ur yesɛedday ara taqanuniyit** n tmezduɣt. Amahil yettwagem ad **yeshel** aselken, mačči ad yesɛeddi.
CGU.s5_s3_l1: **Iserwes d isellem** akk tirrayin n uselkim uqbel ad tent-yesqedcec deg imalasen.
CGU.s5_s3_l2: **Ur yettaɛdil ara kan** ɣef tirrayin n uselkim i yimalas yeqqenen ɣer laman n umekla, ṣṣeḥḥa n ugdud, neɣ addad n yedrimen n tmezduɣt
CGU.s5_s3_l3: **Ad yeḥrez taɣuri d uselmed yettwafraren** i yiqeddacen, bla ma yella seqdec n Amahil
CGU.s5_s3_l4: **Ad yesserwes** yal tirrayin ur yettusesmir ara neɣ yezmer ad yexḍer ɣer terbaɛt n RiveHub s useqsi
CGU.s5_s4_p1: Tsuqiltin n uselkim yettunefken kan i lmend n temsirin. RiveHub ur yesɛedday ara tissekknit, takemmel, neɣ asusem n tsuqiltin, gar-asen isemkilen yeqqenen ɣer laman. Aseqdac yettwareggem ad yesɛu iselmaden yemxallaɛen.
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Isallen yettwakksen seg tugniwin (iraẓen, ifakturat) zemren ad sɛun agmadan. Aseqdac d ameslub ɣef userwes n tissekknit n wazalen, wussan, ismawen n yemceyyɛen, d wayen nniḍen yettwakksen uqbel ad ten-yeskec deg uḥsab neɣ imalasen.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: Azal n Uselkim d amerkanti n daxel yesskanayen takemmel n yisallen yettwakksen deg Amahil. Ur yessenqad ara amal ameqqran n tmezduɣt ur yettwanefk ara d aferdis neɣ ameslub.
CGU.s5_s7_p1: Amahil yetteddu deg imalasen n tɣawsiwin, am:
CGU.s5_s7_l1: Ad yeqqen tira seg tallelt yettwaqqnen
CGU.s5_s7_l2: Snulfu-d umuɣ n uheggi yal ass
CGU.s5_s7_l3: Snulfu-d tira n waggur yal waggur
CGU.s5_s7_l4: Tazelγa n unagraw d temsirin deg imalasen
CGU.s5_s7_p2: Timhalin-agi tteddunt s tuffra zemrent ad ttwaɣzen seg tallelt n yegmam nniḍen. Aseqdac ur ilaq ara ad yeqqen kan ɣef agmadan mbla aserwes.
CGU.s5_s8_p1: Aɣtas i tira yettwakksen s uselkim (tira, icacayen, asnerni) d tirrayin yeḥwaǧen ad yettwabeddel uqbel ad yeffeɣ. RiveHub yettakeṛ deg umḍiq ɣef wayen yeffɣen seg tira s useqdec deg uẓetta aghanib, ɣas ma d Amahil i t-id-yefkan amezwaru.
CGU.s6_s1_p1: RiveHub yeqqaɛ d yesseddaɣ yisallen n idammen ɣef tqanuniyit n Tuddsa n Amazday n Yisallen d Imeskanen n Iɣerfan (PIPEDA), Adabu n Quebec yettwassnen s uḥraz n yisallen n idammen deg uẓref (Adabu 25), d, anda ma yella, Ameggal amatu n Tuddsa n Tarwaṭṭ d Amazday n Yisallen (GDPR).
CGU.s6_s2_p1: Amahil yeqqaɛ d yesseddaɣ tiɣawsiwin n yisallen:
CGU.s6_s2_l1: **Isallen n usken** — Isem, taɣuṛiṛt, isallen n tmezduɣt
CGU.s6_s2_l2: **Isallen deg imalasen** — Tirawin n Amahil, tira n temẓelt, imnukal, tira n usewwi, igmamen
CGU.s6_s2_l3: **Isallen n yedrimen** — Aɣilfen n yigmamen, lfayda, imlalen, amalu yal ass, ifakturat yettwarun
CGU.s6_s2_l4: **Isallen n tira** — Tajumma n umeskan, imalasen, tazelɣa n isemkilen (yettwaqqnen seg tallelt n yegmam)
CGU.s6_s2_l5: **Isallen n usenzi** — Asenzi s tɣawsa, iberdan n tɣellest (yettwaqqnen seg tallelt n POS)
CGU.s6_s2_l6: **Isallen n uneggez** — Tira n lḥedd d waman
CGU.s6_s2_l7: **Isallen n tmaɣla** — Tira n temxallaɛin, iɣes, d tirawin deg uɣerru
CGU.s6_s2_l8: **Ayen yeffɣen n aṭṭazen** — Tugniwin n umekla, tira n iraẓen d yifakturat
CGU.s6_s2_l9: **Isallen n useqdec** — Timlilitin n Amahil, tutlayin, tira n tqenqit
CGU.s6_s3_p1: Isallen n useqdac yettwaḥrez s laman deg uẓetta n Supabase (Amazon Web Services). Isallen yettwakksen deg uɣerru d yettwaqqnen. Amezruy n terbaɛt yesɛedday amezday n yisallen ger tmezduɣin.
CGU.s6_s4_p1: Kra n yisallen yettwazel ɣer tallelt n uselkim n yegmam (Anthropic) i tɣawsiwin (aḥraz n tira, OCR, azwar n tira). RiveHub yettaked ad yeɣzu yisallen n idammen yettwazlen d seqdec kan isallen yeḥwaǧen.
CGU.s6_s5_p1: Iɣtasen n yedata yemmuggen seg imsistimen n POS, ttiɛad n tezmilin, d tɣawsiwin timettiwin ttkemmilin ɣer API n usensel-nni. RiveHub yesɛa kan afus ɣef yedata i yessefkaten i usileɣ n imsertiyen yellan d ilelliyen, ur yesɣaray ara imḍanen n tɣawsiwin n tpayit n imseɣẓanen n irgazen n tmacinin.
CGU.s6_s6_p1: Zgodent i uselɣu usɣiwen, Amseqdac yesɛa izerfan-agi:
CGU.s6_s6_l1: **Azerf n afus** — Ad yegzu aḍris n yedata azemra
CGU.s6_s6_l2: **Azerf n usellek** — Ad yeslek yedata ur neḥsab ara neɣ ur yekmil ara
CGU.s6_s6_l3: **Azerf n usuffeɣ** — Ad yessuter usuffeɣ n yedata azemra
CGU.s6_s6_l4: **Azerf n ussiweḍ** — Ad yeṭṭef yedata deg tallunt i yettwazganen, ttwaɣtisen
CGU.s6_s6_l5: **Azerf n umiḥ** — Ad yumeḥ usileɣ n yedata i tɣawsiwin iǧehden
CGU.s6_s6_l6: **Azerf n usuffeɣ n tɛekkelt** — Ad yessuffeɣ tɛekkelt n usileɣ deg yal akud
CGU.s6_s6_p2: Akken ad yesɛu izerfan-agi, Amseqdac yezmer ad yaɣ RiveHub ɣer taɣamsa yettwabeynen deg tallunt 13.
CGU.s6_s7_p1: Yedata n Umseqdac yettwaṭṭaf i tallunt n ussurif yellan d ilelli d tallunt n 30 n wussan deg usuffeɣ, akken ad yeṭṭef usuffeɣ n yedata. Deg tallunt-agi, yedata yettwaɣtisen ɣer lebda, ɣas ma ilaq ad yettwaṭṭaf i uselɣu.
CGU.s6_s8_p1: Amseqdac yettaṭṭaf afus meqqren ɣef yedata yettwabeynen, yemmuggen, neɣ yettwaɣtisen deg usileɣ. RiveHub ur yesɛi ara izerfan ɣef yedata n Umseqdac.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: Usileɣ n RiveHub, gar-asen aɣbalu n lkud, aẓay, usellif, isura, d tagrumma, yettwamaɛen s unufus usɣiwen d uselɣu. Ur yella kra deg yedrimen-agi i yettunefken i Umseqdac izerfan ɣef tɣawsiwin-agi, i tɣawsiwin n usileɣ deg tɣawsiwin n ussurif.
CGU.s7_s2_p1: Amseqdac yettaṭṭaf izerfan iḍris yemmuggen deg usileɣ (tirayin, imensaten, ttaɛad n tɣawsiwin, tilɣatin, yedata uselɣu). Amseqdac yettunefken i RiveHub tayunt i meẓẓiyen, ur tettwakkes ara, tazwara akken ad yesileɣ aḍris-agi i usileɣ n usileɣ.
CGU.s7_s3_p1: Aḍris yemmuggen s AI deg usuter n Umseqdac (tira n timetti, isekkiren, usuffeɣ, isehlen) yettwabeyyen i Umseqdac i usileɣ n usuddiwar bla tirẓi. RiveHub ur yesɛi ara izerfan uɣrisen ɣef waṭṭanen amgin.
CGU.s8_title: 8. Assurif, Agur, d Tɣawsiwin n Usileɣ
CGU.s8_s1_l1: **Ilel** — Adlis n uɣmis, Amsilem n umensaten, usuffeɣ usɣiwen, tɣawsiwin timettiwin
CGU.s8_s1_l2: **Tamentilt** — Tilɣatin n ilel + ttaɛad n tɣawsiwin n imensi, iɣsan, usileɣ n umensaten
CGU.s8_s1_l3: **Afares** — Tilɣatin n tmentilt + isekkiren n usiɣti, ttiɛad, ttaɛad n uɣtas
CGU.s8_s1_l4: **Talɣa** — Tilɣatin n Afares + tazrewt n uselɣu, AI yellan d iɣalen, ttaɛad n usileɣ
CGU.s8_s1_l5: **Iɣef** — Tilɣatin n Talɣa + ttaɛad n waṭas n tɣawsiwin, taɛekkelt n usuɣer, asiweḍ
CGU.s8_s1_p2: RiveHub yesɛa afus akken ad yesellek tɣawsiwin n ussurif. Yal azellaw ara yesɛun afus ɣef tilɣatin yellan deg tɣawsiwin n ussurif ara yettwabeynen s 30 n wussan n uɣtas.
CGU.s8_s2_p1: Issurifen ttwaɣtisen yal ayyur neɣ yal aseggas deg usuter n Umseqdac, s usistim n tpayit Stripe. Iḍrisen ttwaqnen s dollars Kanadyen (CAD) ɣas ma tɣawsiwin nniden. Agur yettwafraq ɣer tɣawsiwin yettwabeynen.
CGU.s8_s3_p1: Issurifen n yal ayyur ur ttwasuffuɣen ara i tallunt yellan d ilelli. I ussurifen n yal aseggas, asuffeɣ yezmer ad yettwaster deg 14 n wussan n usemɣer. Deg tallunt-agi, ur yella usuffeɣ ara yettwabeynen.
CGU.s8_s4_p1: Amseqdac yezmer ad yesellek tɣawsiwin n ussurif deg yal akud seg tɣawsiwin n ufus. Azellaw yettwabeyyen deg usuffeɣ. Aseggas yettwabeyyen deg tazwara n tallunt n uɣtas, gar-asen afus ɣer tɣawsiwin n tɣawsa.
CGU.s9_s1_p1: Usileɣ yettwabeyyen "akkagi" d "akkagi yella". RiveHub ur yezmer ara ad yebyen usileɣ ad yeqqen s tɣawsiwin ur neḍriren ara, ur yettwazganen ara, tqenneɛen, neɣ yettwaselk i tɣawsiwin iḍehren.
CGU.s9_s2_p1: Deg kra n tɣawsiwin RiveHub, imselɣen, imɣaren, neɣ imeqqranen ad yettwaṭṭafen:
CGU.s9_s2_l1: Tizbeltin n uselɣu yemmuggen seg yedata ur neḥsab ara yemmuggen s AI neɣ yettwaṭṭafen ɣer OCR
CGU.s9_s2_l2: Tizbeltin n uselɣu yemmuggen seg ussiweḍ meqqren ɣef iseɣtiren n usileɣ
CGU.s9_s2_l3: Imensi neɣ tizbeltin yemmuggen ɣer iseɣtiren n AI
CGU.s9_s2_l4: Ur ttwaḥsaben ara deg yedata yemmuggen seg iseqsiyen n tɣawsiwin (POS, ttiɛad)
CGU.s9_s2_l5: Aḍris yettwabeynen s Umseqdac ɣef tɣawsiwin timettiwin, ɣas ma yettwamuggen s usileɣ
CGU.s9_s2_l6: Azekka n usileɣ yemmuggen s tɣawsiwin iɣribiyen (amezdaɣ, imsebɣaten n AI, tajumma yettwamudden)
CGU.s9_s3_p1: Tizɣert n RiveHub meqqren ɣer Umseqdac tettwazgan ɣer yedrimen n ussurif yemmuggen s Umseqdac deg **tmerwin d sin (12) n wayyuren** ɣer tɣawsa yettunefken i uttekli.
CGU.s9_s4_p1: RiveHub ur yettutṭaf ara d amesɣar ɣef kra n tuɣẓint i d-yekkan seg wayen yellan s ddaw tezmert, gar-asen bla ma yella kra n uḥerrez: talsa tijjanin, leɛwayeq, imenɣan, tuɣẓint n usunag n Internet, tuɣẓin n wid yettaken afus n tallat nniḍen, neɣ tigawin n unabaḍ.
CGU.s10_s1_p1: Aseqdac yezmer ad yessenger taneccadt-is melmi i yebɣa s usentel n uḥsab neɣ s usentel n tezrawt n Stripe. Asenger yettwalu deg taggara n tallit n tezrawt yellan tura.
CGU.s10_s2_p1: RiveHub teḥrez azref ad tḥebbes neɣ ad tesenger ufindu n Useqdac ma yella ixulef waruren-agi, asexdem amcum n Usnas, ur yettuxellis ara di yal waqet, neɣ kra n tigawt yezmer ad tḍerr Usnas neɣ iseqdacen nniḍen. Aseqdac ad yettwaɣber s imayl uqbel kra n usenger, ɣas akken deg tɣawsiwin ireffsen.
CGU.s10_s3_p1: Mi yettwasenger, Aseqdac yesɛa tallit n **30 wussan** akken ad yessuffeɣ data-s s usexdem n yifenanen n usuffeɣ n Usnas. Deg taggara n tallit-agi, data ad tettwaṭṭef s ungal 6.7. RiveHub tettɛahid ad tefk data deg talɣa yettwaṣeqsen, yettwaxedmen s tmasinin (CSV, JSON).
CGU.s10_s4_p1: Mi yettwasenger, akk tuqqniwin nniḍen (isentimen n POS, taɣriwin, timetti) ttwassenɣent s yiman-nsent. Isekren n tiddukla n OAuth ttwakeksen. Aseqdac d amesɣar ɣef ubeddel belli tuqqniwin ttwakeksen s ṣṣeḥ yakk usnasen nniḍen.
CGU.s11_p1: RiveHub teḥrez azref ad tbeddel waruren-agi melmi i tebɣa. Iseqdacen ad ttwaɣbaren ɣef kra n ubeddel ilan s imayl d uɣalen deg usnas, s azal n **15 wussan** uqbel ma bedden waruren imaynuten.
CGU.s11_p2: Asexdem ad yeqqen n Usnas mi bedden waruren imaynuten yettwamneɛ belli yettwaqbel waruren ibeddlen.
CGU.s11_p3: Ma yella ur yeqbil Aseqdac ubeddelen, yezmer ad yessenger taneccadt-is s ungal 10 uqbel ma bedden waruren imaynuten.
CGU.s12_p1: Waruren-agi ttwaluɣen s waruren n Tɣiwant n Quebec d waruren ilelliyen n Canada yellan dinna.
CGU.s12_p2: Kra n umgired i d-yekkan seg waruren-agi neɣ seg usxdem n Usnas ad yettwafk i tɣalt n temsal iɛlayan n tɣiwanin n Tɣiwant n Quebec, Taggayt n Montreal.
CGU.s12_p3: Deg wakud n umgired, tarbaɛt ad msefhamen akken ad ɛerḍen ad sseddun timsal s ṣṣfa uqbel ad ḍeggren fell-asen.
CGU.s13_p1: I kra n asteqsiyen ɣef waruren-agi, aḥraz n data-nwen, neɣ lxedma n Usnas, s kra n ṣṣfa ssawel-aɣ ɣer: **support@rivehub.com**

AIPage.meta_title: AI i usbeddi n usnay — RiveHub
AIPage.meta_description: Af-d amek AI i usbeddi n usnay tettzegre idrimen n udɣaɣ, taɣult n HACCP, asuqilt s 25 tutlayin. Asnas ilelli n AI — ur yettḥwaj ara akart n tezrawt.
AIPage.hero_title: Asnas n AI yettwabnan i yisnayen
AIPage.hero_description: RiveHub tettseqdec intelligence artificielle akken ad tzegre aṭṭaf n idrimen n udɣaɣ, taɣult n HACCP, asuqilt s 25 tutlayin — akken ad tezmrem ad tḥettmem ɣef tmehna, macci ɣef tseddartin.
AIPage.what_title: D acu i tzemrem AI ad t-texdem i usnay-nwen?
AIPage.what_description: AI i usbeddi n usnay tbeddel tigawin s iman-nsent s usexdem n uzegreɣ. Seg uskaner n tɣawsiwin ɣer uɣawas n wazalen, ar da amek AI tebeddel tigawin n yal ass.
AIPage.f1_desc: AI tettwali tazrawt n tɣawsiwin n usqeddec, teftirt n tlemmast, d imawalen n imseqdacen akken ad tesseɣret idis-is n texḍart — tbeddel teftirtin s talɣa teɣlayin, ttwaftehmen.
AIPage.f2_desc: AI tettwali uḥraz n tɣawsiwin, tettɛerreḍ tɣawsiwin yellan d imɣaben, d tisura yellan d tlemmast — tettḥarezz usnay-nwen s ṣṣeḥ d ukatar n ubeddel.
AIPage.f3_title: Tazrawt n idrimen n udɣaɣ n tallit
AIPage.f3_desc: Aṭṭaf n idrimen n tɣawsiwin, ad tfehmem kra n tɣawsiwin ur yettbanen ara, d ubeddel n tezrawt ɣef yal taɣawsa — ad tesɛut imalasen. AI tettɛerreḍ-ken uqbel ma ɛlayen idrimen.
AIPage.f4_desc: Ṭṭef tawaɣit neɣ d arẓiɣ i PDF. AI tettgelleb yal taɣawsa n uɣawas, aɣawas, azal, d idrimen — tbeddel kra n tɣawsiwin deg kra n snat.
AIPage.f5_desc: Af-d taɣawsiwin-nwen ilan s idrimen s tazrawt n BCG. AI tettmeslay ubeddelen deg usuqilt s ddaw idrimen n udɣaɣ.
AIPage.f6_desc: AI yesuqel tira n imyalat, timitarin, d udlis n ttawilat i trebbaɛ timseggetin – ad yetqadar yal amɛayin n trebbaɛ amkan-is s lekmal.
AIPage.why_description: Tiraɛ iḍrisen ɣef uselsu n AI i ussikel ɛerrḍen-d usawen yiseggar, iswiɛen iɣɣanen, d ussisir iɣɣanen. D acu yetbeddil mi ara tbeddleḍ tamuɣli d tmusni.
AIPage.b1_desc: AI yesukkes taɛerrḍa n isebtaren, taɛerrḍa n iselken, d ussuqel n iqimen i useqqel ɛerrḍen i ttaɛerrḍa s lekmal. Trebbaɛ-ik seḥbeɣ waqṭen i usɣer d waqṭen i uselken.
AIPage.b2_desc: Uqadar n waqṭen d tmusni n wamiqɛ ttaɛerrḍen i tiraɛ ad sɛerrḍen d ussikel ɣef uswiɛen iɣɣanen – ɛerrḍen ad seɣɣen uselsu ɣer tazwara n waggur.
AIPage.b3_desc: Taɛerrḍa n HACCP iqqnen-d tettɣimi tettɣimi i tazzla qbel tmusni. AI yesuqel iselken-ik s lekmal, s tmusni, d uselken yiseggar.
AIPage.how_title: Amek RiveHub yesselsu AI ɣer tiraɛ-ik
AIPage.how_description: RiveHub ur d uselsu iɛeggalen s AI yettwarḍel. Yal aḥric yettwaxdam ɣef amek tiraɛ ɛerrḍen – seg uɣerbaz ɣer uqendur n uɣerbaz.
AIPage.step1_desc: Sseɣreq POS (Toast, Square, Lightspeed, SumUp, Zettle)-inek, talseɣ isebtaren, d teɛerrḍeḍ trebbaɛ-ik. Aselsu yeɛraq ar 15 teswiɛin.
AIPage.step2_desc: Deg 48 teswiɛin, AI n RiveHub yeqqar iswiɛen n uselsu-inek, tiggatin n uselken-inek, d ussisir-inek – d yuɣal yebda yettak tmusni.
AIPage.step3_desc: Iɣilalen yal ass ɣef tiɣimitin n uswiɛen n ttawil, iselken n ussisir yettwasukkesen, ttawilat n udlis n ttawil yettwaxdamen, d udlis n ttawil iɣɣanen – yal wa ɛeqleɣ usɣer.
AIPage.step4_desc: Mi ara tiraɛ-ik teqqar, AI tettwagg-inek – tettqeddic mgal imukan, iɛeggalen ijdiden, d ussisir yettwagg-inen ɛeqleɣ taɛerrḍa n uɣerbaz.
AIPage.cta_title: Yalḥa-k ad tessekcem AI ɣer tiraɛ-ik?
AIPage.cta_description: Amek tiraɛ ar amaḍal yettqeddicen RiveHub i usekkes n imiyalaten, uselles n iqimen, d uqadar – yettwaxdam s tmusni tagejdant.
AIPage.cta_subtext: Ulac aqariḍ n ukartat yettwaḥwaj. Aqariḍ war aqariḍ, i lebda.

FAQ.title: Isteqsiyen yettusettanen
FAQ.subtitle: Ayen akk i ilaqen ad t-tissineḍ qbel ad tbeddeḍ
FAQ.q1_q: Amek i tettzeg RiveHub s usuter-iw n POS?
FAQ.q1_a: RiveHub tezga s usuter n POS ameqqranen am Toast, Square, SumUp, Lightspeed, d Zettle. Aseftiḥ yeqqel d imecṭuḥ - awi kan afus, data-k ad tebdu tezga tettekka.
FAQ.q2_q: Yella data n uɣerbaz-iw d amaḍal?
FAQ.q2_a: Ih. Data akk tettelqeḍ deg tranzit d anda tezga. Nseqdec infrastructure n Supabase s tɣellist n uswir, anamek-is data-k tettwasemmaḥ d tekkat kan trebbaɛ-nnek. Ur nezneɣ, ur nezzenz data-k.
FAQ.q3_q: Aceḥal n lweqt ara yeddem ad nefres?
FAQ.q3_a: Aṭas n uɣerbazat tezga tetteddu deg 15 n daqiqat. Zzeg usuter-ik n POS, qqer i trebbaɛ-nnek, RiveHub tebda tlemmad asufeg-ik deg yiwet n lweqt. Ad terreḍ isumar-ik imezwura deg 48 n ssaɛat.
FAQ.q4_q: D acu ara d-yilin seld uɣelluy uginan?
FAQ.q4_a: Uɣelluy Essence uginan ur yesɛi ara talast n lweqt - seqdec-it aceḥal ara tebɣuḍ. Ma tellaḍ theggaḍ i leḥwayej n AI ameqqranen am taseftit, d timmad, ɣel Horizon neɣ Intelligence deg yal lweqt.
FAQ.q5_q: Tzemmer trebbaɛ-iw ad seqdacen RiveHub s tutlayt-nsen?
FAQ.q5_a: Ih. RiveHub tettarra afus i 25 n tutlayin d uɣerbazaten - seg ufransis d tanglizit ɣer bengali, taqbaylit d tacantonese. Yal tiggawt, akarti n useftiḥ d ussan d isseḥruyen, tettelqeḍ deg yal yiwen n trebbaɛ. Ulac aɣbel n tutlayt.
FAQ.q6_a: RiveHub tettwafres akken ad tettwabeggen. Tamudemt tettunefk kan i tiggawin - trebbaɛ-ik zemren ad bdun ad seqdacen deg yiwet n lweqt. Nezmer daɣen ad d-nefk izerrar n useftiḥ, trebbaɛ-nneɣ tettarra afus deg yiwet n tmezlaɣt i isteqsiyen.
FAQ.q7_q: Amek i tettarra RiveHub afus i timmad n HACCP?
FAQ.q7_a: RiveHub tettedddu am tabdart-ik. Taggugt n temrarat, isseɣrasen, d lewṣayat n lxedma ttazzalen ɣer tiblatin n timmad d ussebter ulac aɣbel.
